{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260323164108B1490F5BF8C9F63A728B\"}"},"total":389},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"6811088893124149260","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"非常好，气势恢宏，场面壮观，故事性也很强。就是孙悟空感情描述上弱了一些，龙女有点鸡胁。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1585830213,"group_id":"1619002277549060","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nxk2ogvCPwhANHGakWwDhnn04ROOtc6TVZpk2YZsHCSu","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"2211845320486452","user_name":"用户22118453"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2211845320486452","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"1619002277549060","book_info":{"abstract":"孙悟空上续太古以来的仙神争霸，下连诸天仙尊神王血斗，一路斩妖除魔，成就一段不朽传奇。天殇延续老叶一贯的权谋风格，局中有局，套中有套，被许多读者认为是写得最好的西游后传。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-images/c1edc5d98f29f1ad1cf84185e21819ce","author":"叶之秋","author_id":"","book_id":"1619002277549060","book_name":"西游：万古妖圣","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1363人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":257,\"name\":\"玄幻脑洞\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257\u0026name=玄幻脑洞\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":7,\"name\":\"玄幻\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7\u0026name=玄幻\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":373,\"name\":\"西游衍生\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=373\u0026name=西游衍生\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6631444651570119172","read_count":"1363","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"4410123"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.7","serial_count":"1637","tags":"玄幻脑洞,西游衍生,玄幻","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-images/f3a917560787b28d2184c051e6e672b2~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779439268\u0026x-signature=NCtW1vDHCs%2FnYnc23p2WyGlQKOs%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3632094234","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":""},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260323164108B1490F5BF8C9F63A728B\"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读55小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":40,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":198091,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":198091,"reply_count":5,"show_pv":96440},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"6976212233739305761","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好书！我已经反复看三遍了！叶尊的文采大气磅礴，跌宕起伏，尤其对中国的历史人物，典故出处，以及宗教文化等都也非常了解。是真正为数不多的原创作品！！！叶尊的文字流畅且细腻，思路清晰很严谨，把主人公孙悟空的成长辛劳历程描写的入木三分，犹如置身其中，亲临其境一般！虽然，文章仍有个别错漏之处，尤其文章结尾部分，未尽人意，遗憾至极！但，全文毋庸置疑，绝对上乘之作！","text_exts":[{"e":99,"s":96,"text":"孙悟空","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44\u0026hyperlink_type=quote_book\u0026directQueryWord=%E5%AD%99%E6%82%9F%E7%A9%BA\u0026directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774255268F63A728B%230%23%23\u0026directTabType=0\u0026reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%226976212233739305761%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%221619002277549060%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%AD%99%E6%82%9F%E7%A9%BA%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D\u0026halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1624275988,"group_id":"1619002277549060","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"该说晚安了","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Ny40GTz1ETREc+/OFVfNFDfBP4sBPv14qli0lcX52KPj","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776790605\u0026x-signature=YlzhmTSXCiJ8jjqgO%2BoHwuKOIgo%3D","user_id":"3267353013399997","user_name":"很有礼貌的轻生道晚安"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3267353013399997","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"1619002277549060","book_info":{"abstract":"孙悟空上续太古以来的仙神争霸，下连诸天仙尊神王血斗，一路斩妖除魔，成就一段不朽传奇。天殇延续老叶一贯的权谋风格，局中有局，套中有套，被许多读者认为是写得最好的西游后传。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-images/c1edc5d98f29f1ad1cf84185e21819ce","author":"叶之秋","author_id":"","book_id":"1619002277549060","book_name":"西游：万古妖圣","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1363人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":257,\"name\":\"玄幻脑洞\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257\u0026name=玄幻脑洞\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":7,\"name\":\"玄幻\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7\u0026name=玄幻\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":373,\"name\":\"西游衍生\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=373\u0026name=西游衍生\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"66314446
